titleStmt.title: SII 41.268: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 268. (A.R. No. 485 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the third gōpura of the Vataranyesvara temple at Tiruvalangadu, right of entrance.

p.hi: Chōḻa, Rajakesarivarman Rājādhirāja I, Year 31 = 1049 A.D.

summary.p: Sale of land, free of taxes, by the sabhā of [Sin]gaḷāntaka-chaturvēdimangalam in Naḍuvinmalai-Peru[mūr]-nāḍu. One Ādittan Pichāṉ had donated the sale price to the temple of Tiruvālangāḍu in Paḻaiyaṉūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷer tarutaṉṟoṅkal veṇ kuṭaikkiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malar makaṭ puṇarntu ceṅkolācci karuṅkalikaṭintutaṉ ciriya tātaiyaiyun=tiruttamaiyuṅ kuṟikoḷtaṉniḷaṅkokkaḷaiyum neṟiyuṇar tirupputalvar tammaiyum tu
ṉṟeḻil vānavaṉ villavaṉ minavaṉ kaṅkan Ilaṅkaiyark kiṟaivan pulaṅkeḻaṟ pallavaṉ kaṉṉakucciyar kāvalaṉ Eṉa poṉṉaṇi cuṭarmaṇi makuṭañ cūṭṭip paṭar pukaḻāṅkavarkkavar nāṭaruḷip pāṅkuṟa maṉṉu pallūḻiyuḷ teṉṉavar muvaruḷ māṉāparaṇan poṉmuṭi
Āṉāp pāttivar pacun=talai porukaḷattarintu vāḷaraviya kaḻal virakeraḷaṉai tacaivil cun=tarapāṇṭiyaṉ Oṟṟai veṇkuṭaiyuṅ kaṟṟai veṇkavariyuñ ciṅkātaṉamum veṅkaḷattiḻantu muṭiviḻat talaivirittaṭitaḷarn=toṭa tollai mullai
yūrt turatti Olkalil veṇāṭṭaraicai ceṇāṭṭu Otukki mevupukaḻ Irāmakuṭam muvarkeṭa muṉintu viṭalkeḻu villavan kuṭarmaṭik koṇṭu tannāṭu viṭṭoṭik kāṭupukkoḷippa velaikeḻu kāntaḷurccālai kalamaṟuppittāhāvamallaṉumañcak
paṭaiyāl rkaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭiyat tiṇṭiṟal virutaruvikkiyum vicaiyātittaṉum karumuraṭcākkamayaṉum mutaliyar camarapīruvottuṭai nimir cuṭarp poṉṉoṭaiyṅkari puraviyoṭum piṭittu taṇṇāṭaiyiṟ cayaṅkoṇṭoṉṉār koḷḷi
pākkai Uḷḷeri maṭuppittorutaṉi taṇṭāṟ porukaṭalilaṅkaiyar komāṉ vikkirama bāhuvin makuṭamummuṉ tanakkuṭaittu teṉṟamiḻ ma muḻuvatu miḻanteḻukaṭaliḻam pukku vilaṅkecaṉākiya vikkirama pāṇṭiyan parumaṇi makuṭamum kāṇṭaku taṉatākiya kaṉṉakucciyilumāḻ kaṭaliḻañ ciriteṉṟeṇṇi Uḷa
ṅkoḷ nāṭit taṉṉuṟavoṭum pukuntu viḷaṅku muṭikavitta viracalāmekaṉ porukaḷattañci taṉkārkaḷiṟaḻantu kavvaiyuṟṟoṭik kātaliyoṭun=ta . yaippiṭittu tāyai mukkariya Āṅkavamāṉam niṅkutaṟkāka miṭṭuvantu vāṭṭoḻiliḻantu veṅkaḷattulan=tavac ciṅkaḷattaracaṉ poṉṉaṇi muṭiyum kaṉnaraṉ vaḻivantuṟai koḷiḻa
ttaracannākiya cirivallavan matanarācan ṇṭu vaṭapulattirukālāvatum porupaṭai naṭātti kaṇṭaraṉ tiṉakaranāraṇaṉ kaṇavati vaṇṭalar teriyal maticūtanaṉeṉṟeṉai palavaracarai muṉaivayiṟṟuratti vampalar tarupoḻil kampilinakaruḷ caḷukkiya
r māḷikai takarppittiḷakkam villavar miṉavar veḻkula Aiyyaṇar ciṅkaḷar n=tirar mutaliyavaraicariṭu tiṟaiyumāṟiloṉṟavaṉiyil kūṟukoḷ poruḷkaḷumukantu nāṉmaṟaiyavar mukantukoḷakkuṭuttu viśvalokattu viḷaṅku maṉuneṟiniṉṟaśvameta yākañ ceytaruḷiyirun=ta jayaṅkoṇṭa cōḻanuyar
n=ta perumpukaḻ kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājāti [3 10 1] jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu naṭuviṉmalaip perumurnāṭṭu ciṅkaḷānta caruppEtimaṅkalattu mahā sabhaiyom nilavilaiyāvaṇakkai Eḻuttu meṉpaḻaiya(ṉ)ṉūr nāṭṭu paḻaiya(ṉ)ṉūr tiruvālaṅkāṭu Uṭaiya mahāte
vaṟkku Ātittaṉ picāṉṉāṉa coḻakulati ttukku vaicca kācu muppatu tiruvālaṅkāṭu Uṭaiya Ātitāsacaṇṭ[ Eśva] rar pakkal koṇṭu Ivviḷakkukku nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷur melpiṭākai poḷipākkattu tiruvekampavatikku meṟkum Accalkaṇṭa vāykkā(l)lukku teṟkkum mutal
kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñcatirattum Añcāñcatirattum viṟkiṉṟa nilam śrīpātak kolāl Āyirattu Aiññūṟu kuḻiyum viṟṟu kellai sabhaiyom nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellaisabhaiyom nilattukkum cāṟṟuppaṭikku vaṭakkum melpāṟke
llai paḻaiyaṉūr Ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāl kellai Accalkaṇṭavāykkālukku teṟkum Iṉnāṉkellaikkum Uḷpaṭṭa nilattil teṟkaṭain=ta paḻan kolā
āyirattaññūṟu kuḻinilamum Iṟaipporuḷum vilaipporuḷum Aṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭut poṉṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa Epperpaṭṭa Iṟaiyum nāṅkaḷe Iṟupomākavum Ippaṭikku paḻampaṭinirpāyum vaṇṇam nirpāccik koḷḷavum Eripaṭṭik ko
ḷḷappeṟuvarāka viṭṭa Iṉṉilam celutta māṭṭomākil Ivviḷakku Oṉṟukku Āṇṭu varaitoṇṇūṟṟu nāḻi neyyāka Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum muṭṭāme tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiyār paṇṭārattu Aṭṭuvomāka ciṅkaḷān=taka catu
rvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom sabhaiyuḷḷiruntu Ivvūr karaṇattāṉ veṅkaṭattevaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 41.268 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
